platform.gpu: 8 x AMD Instinct MI308X (192 GB HBM each, gfx942)
platform.cpu: 2 x AMD EPYC 9654 (384 threads), ~1.5 TB RAM
platform.device_under_test: Mingxin FX100 all-flash NVMe-oF array: 4-disk RAID0 (14 TB, XFS), RoCEv2, single 100 GbE port
baselines: local NVMe single disk (PCIe Gen4, 2 TB)

notes: All numbers below are measured results from signed/official test reports (R1-R5 report IDs match https://mingxinstorage.xyz/evidence).
480B numbers use the production deployment form (TP8 single instance or TP4x2 dual instance) under long-context cold-recovery load.
Numbers are platform- and condition-specific; do not extrapolate across platforms.

experiments.title: 480B TP8 single instance, long-context cold recovery, three-way comparison x concurrency sweep
experiments.mechanism: local disk saturates at 6.78 GB/s; FX100 sustains 10.2-10.4 GB/s aggregate read

experiments.title: 480B TP4x2 dual instance, nine-config full metrics (TTFT p50/p90/p99, TPOT, throughput, disk bandwidth)

headline.fs_shared_pool_cross_instance_hot_sharin: verified, 32/32 cross-read full hits, zero performance penalty

caveats: fs:// URL must be written as fs://local:0/path (URL validation bug in the tested LMCache version)
CPU staging tier must be >= in-flight KV volume, otherwise TPOT diverges at low concurrency (root-caused and fixed)

experiments.title: LMCache local_disk_backend parallel-read patch (single GPU, concurrency 16, cold disk read, Qwen2.5-32B)
Training checkpoint concurrent write (8 GPUs, 32B LoRA, 65.6 GB full-model snapshot each)
Concurrent model loading (8 GPUs simultaneous cold read)
Model-switching effective token throughput (20 switches/hour tier)
14B HBM-efficiency study, seven-config comparison (GDS direct read / two recompute HBM tiers / low-HBM direct read)
experiments.platform_note: This round ran on MetaX N260 single GPU; methodology is cross-platform but numbers must not be mixed with MI308X results.

experiments.title: Huawei Atlas 910B x8 (Kunpeng-920): model loading / training checkpoint / training data acceleration vs NFS baseline
experiments.platform_note: Ascend 910B platform, not MI308X; reported as-is.
